reflection.candidate_lesson: When internal MOMENTUM regime lacks external TradingView confirmation (0 TV signals), only take the highest-conviction consensus pairs (conv >= 83% AND green_matches >= 2 AND hist_hr > 60%) and skip everything else — the 75% sizing multiplier already signals the system distrusts itself.
reflection.mechanism: Institutional flow that produces durable momentum leaves footprints across venues; when only one venue (internal) sees it, the move is likely retail-driven noise or a stale internal signal. Requiring cross-confirmation via both consensus conviction AND historical hit-rate memory filters out single-venue false positives — the exact regime where uncommitted price action decays fastest.
reflection.testable_rule: if tv_confirmation == 'UNKNOWN' and tv_signal_count == 0: require (consensus_conv >= 0.83 and green_matches >= 2 and hist_hr > 0.60) else veto

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
